privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, email, country, and timezone when creating your account. While using the service, we collect data about your lesson sessions, feedback, and payment history.
privacy.s2Text: We use your data to: provide and improve the service, process payments, send notifications about your lessons, and marketing communications (with your consent).
privacy.s3Text: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with necessary service providers: Stripe for payments (independent controller for card data — your card data never passes through our servers; see stripe.com/privacy), Resend for transactional emails, and a TURN provider for call relay. Transfers to the USA are made under Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs). Our infrastructure is hosted in Lithuania (EU), covered by the GDPR adequacy decision.
privacy.s4Text: We use essential cookies to maintain your authenticated session and analytics cookies (with your consent) to understand how the platform is used. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time.
privacy.s5Text: You have the right to: access your data, correct inaccurate information, request account deletion, export your data, and revoke consents. To exercise your rights, access your account settings or contact support.
privacy.s6Text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit (HTTPS) and at rest, and JWT authentication with short-lived tokens.
privacy.s7Text: For privacy questions, exercising your rights (GDPR Arts. 15-22), or to report a security incident, contact us: privacy@corgly.app. We respond within 15 business days (LGPD) / 1 month (GDPR). In the event of a personal data breach, we will notify the relevant supervisory authority within 72 hours (GDPR) or 2 business days (ANPD/LGPD).
privacy.s8Text: Under LGPD (Art. 18) and GDPR, you have the right to: confirmation of data processing, access to your data, correction of incomplete or outdated data, anonymization or blocking of unnecessary data, data portability to another provider, deletion of data processed with consent, information about sharing, and withdrawal of consent. To exercise any of these rights, access your account settings or contact our Data Protection Officer.
privacy.s9Text: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate the platform. Essential cookies are required for authentication and security. Analytics cookies (with your consent) help us understand usage patterns. Marketing cookies (with your consent) enable content personalization. You can manage your preferences at any time through the cookie banner or in your browser settings.
privacy.s10Text: For questions related to personal data protection, contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at: privacy@corgly.app. We respond to all requests within 15 business days, as required by LGPD.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1Text: By accessing and using the Corgly platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not access the service.
terms.s2Text: Corgly is a Brazilian Portuguese learning platform with a native teacher, offering individual live lessons via video conferencing. Purchased credits are valid for 6 months from the date of purchase.
terms.s3Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password and for restricting access to your computer. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.s4Text: Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Cancellations with less than 24 hours notice will result in the deduction of the corresponding credit. No refund of credits will be given for sessions not cancelled in advance.
terms.s5Text: All payments are securely processed via Stripe. Credits are non-refundable after purchase, except in cases of proven billing errors. Credits expire 6 months after the purchase date.
terms.s6Text: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of third parties. Recording lessons without the explicit consent of the teacher is prohibited.
terms.s7Text: For questions about these Terms of Use, contact us through the support available on the platform.
terms.s8Text: The processing of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, which is an integral part of these Terms of Use. By accepting these terms, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to the Privacy Policy.
terms.s9Text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Significant changes will be communicated with at least 30 days' notice via email and/or platform notification. Continued use of the service after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s10Text: These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. The courts of the District of São Paulo, State of São Paulo, are elected as the competent forum to settle any disputes arising from these terms, waiving any other, however privileged it may be.
terms.s11Text: For questions, suggestions, or complaints about these Terms of Use or the service, contact us at: support@corgly.app. Our team will respond within 5 business days.

hero.title: Learn Brazilian Portuguese with a native teacher
hero.subtitle: Live 1:1 lessons with the Corgly Method. Measurable progress, real support.
hero.professor_alt: Pedro Corgnati, Brazilian Portuguese teacher, smiling in a home office

professor.title: Meet Pedro
professor.subtitle: Native Brazilian Portuguese teacher with his own methodology
professor.bio: I'm Pedro Corgnati, a native Brazilian Portuguese teacher with years of experience teaching international students of all levels. I developed the Corgly Method to ensure measurable progress in every lesson cycle.
professor.image_alt: Pedro Corgnati, Brazilian Portuguese teacher, smiling in a home office

method.title: The Corgly Method
method.subtitle: A methodology designed to ensure real and measurable progress in Brazilian Portuguese.

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.description: Commitment to clear goals and mutual accountability between student and teacher.

time_boxed.title: Time-Boxed
time_boxed.description: Learning cycles with defined timeframes for focus and consistent progress.

cycle_based.title: Cycle-Based
cycle_based.description: Cycle structure that integrates practice, feedback, and learning consolidation.

shared_context.title: Shared Context
shared_context.description: Shared context between lessons for continuity and real evolution.

feedback_loop.title: Feedback Loop
feedback_loop.description: Constant and structured feedback for correction and continuous improvement.

pricing.title: Invest in your Portuguese
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your routine
pricing.discount_banner: ★ Your first lesson is 50% off — only $12.50!

content_preview.title: Coming soon: free lessons
content_preview.subtitle: We are preparing free grammar, vocabulary, and pronunciation content. Sign up to be notified when it launches.

testimonials.title: What students say
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from students around the world

maria.name: Maria Chen
maria.text: In 3 months with Pedro, I was able to communicate with my Brazilian husband's family for the first time. The Corgly Method is incredible!

giulia.name: Giulia Rossi
giulia.text: The 1:1 lessons made all the difference. The structured feedback after each session helps me focus on what really needs improving.

james.name: James O'Brien
james.text: I tried several language apps before and none worked like live lessons with Pedro. I recommend without hesitation.

how_it_works.a: Lessons are 1:1 live via video conference, lasting 50 minutes. You schedule at your preferred time and receive the access link by email.

duration.a: 50 minutes at the top of the hour.

cancel.a: Yes, up to 24 hours in advance without losing your credit. Cancellations less than 24 hours in advance result in the credit being deducted.

timezone.q: How does the time zone work?
timezone.a: You can schedule in any time zone. The system automatically converts to your local time.

credits_expire.a: Yes, credits expire 6 months after the purchase date.

first_lesson.q: How does the first lesson discount work?
first_lesson.a: $12.50 (50% OFF) — valid once per account for new students.

cta.title: Ready to truly learn Portuguese?
cta.subtitle: First lesson at 50% off. No long-term commitment.
